users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage workspace members, roles and invitations
users.invite_hint: The invite is a single-use link — copy it and send it yourself (no email is sent).
users.link_once: This link is shown once — copy it now. It expires in 7 days.
users.reset_link_once: Password-reset link — shown once, expires in 24 hours.
users.transfer_confirm: {name} becomes the owner and you become an admin. Confirm?
users.delete_confirm: Their {count} items will be reassigned to the owner. Confirm?
users.role_viewer_hint: Read-only: sees all data and portals, changes nothing
users.role_editor_hint: Full data + portal editing and publishing
users.role_admin_hint: Everything, plus user management and system settings

data.no_vector: No vector layers yet. Upload a Shapefile, GeoJSON, or GeoPackage.
data.no_raster: No raster files yet. Upload a GeoTIFF.
